title: Explorer's Compass Addon
description: This project backports the improved search logic from newer versions of Explorer's Compass to Fabric 1.20.1, fixing the issue where the compass would repeatedly find the structure the player is currently close to.
body:
# Explorer's Compass: Improved Search Backport

This is a specific addon for [Explorer's Compass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/explorers-compass) on **Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric)**. 

It backports the **Improved Search Logic** from newer versions (1.21+), fixing the issue where the compass would repeatedly find the structure the player is currently inside.

## Features

- **Next-Closest Search**: Automatically skips the structure you are currently standing in when searching for the same structure type again.


## Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.20.1
- **Fabric Loader**: Latest
- **Fabric API**: Latest
- **Explorer's Compass**: 1.20.1-2.2.3-fabric (or compatible)

## How to Use

### For Players
Simply install this mod alongside the original Explorer's Compass mod.

## Building from Source

1.  Clone this repository.
2.  Run the build command:
    ```bash
    ./gradlew build
    ```
3.  The compiled jar will be in `build/libs`.

Original Mod by [ChaosTheDude](https://github.com/MattCzyr/ExplorersCompass).
